raw_response: {"rating": -2.3, "lean": "Lean Left", "explanation": "This is a news report. The author's own prose repeatedly characterizes immigration enforcement as \"violent\" and \"aggressive\" and foregrounds concerns about noncriminal workers being arrested, without comparable balancing context, indicating a left-leaning frame. The consistency of these editorial choices supports a Lean Left rating of -2.3. Detailed Analysis: (1) The author asserts that ICE agents have used \"violent methods\" to detain immigrants and later references \"violent tactics,\" adopting negatively weighted language in their own voice; (2) The article labels policy as \"aggressive immigration detention tactics\" and describes \"Border Patrol's aggressive tactics\"—repeated negative evaluative descriptors applied to enforcement; (3) The author frames that the president \"addressed concerns that his deportation agenda was arresting landscapers, farmers and other laborers, not just the criminals,\" humanizing noncriminals and implying overreach; (4) The piece highlights internal ICE data with the value-laden modifier \"only\" (e.g., \"only 6%\" and \"11%\"), emphasizing a narrative that enforcement is not focused on the most serious offenders, without presenting countervailing metrics; (5) The author provides no independent balancing context supportive of the enforcement rationale beyond attributed quotes, resulting in a structurally one-sided presentation."}

parsed_output.explanation: This is a news report. The author's own prose repeatedly characterizes immigration enforcement as "violent" and "aggressive" and foregrounds concerns about noncriminal workers being arrested, without comparable balancing context, indicating a left-leaning frame. The consistency of these editorial choices supports a Lean Left rating of -2.3. Detailed Analysis: (1) The author asserts that ICE agents have used "violent methods" to detain immigrants and later references "violent tactics," adopting negatively weighted language in their own voice; (2) The article labels policy as "aggressive immigration detention tactics" and describes "Border Patrol's aggressive tactics"—repeated negative evaluative descriptors applied to enforcement; (3) The author frames that the president "addressed concerns that his deportation agenda was arresting landscapers, farmers and other laborers, not just the criminals," humanizing noncriminals and implying overreach; (4) The piece highlights internal ICE data with the value-laden modifier "only" (e.g., "only 6%" and "11%"), emphasizing a narrative that enforcement is not focused on the most serious offenders, without presenting countervailing metrics; (5) The author provides no independent balancing context supportive of the enforcement rationale beyond attributed quotes, resulting in a structurally one-sided presentation.

explanation: This is a news report. The author's own prose repeatedly characterizes immigration enforcement as "violent" and "aggressive" and foregrounds concerns about noncriminal workers being arrested, without comparable balancing context, indicating a left-leaning frame. The consistency of these editorial choices supports a Lean Left rating of -2.3. Detailed Analysis: (1) The author asserts that ICE agents have used "violent methods" to detain immigrants and later references "violent tactics," adopting negatively weighted language in their own voice; (2) The article labels policy as "aggressive immigration detention tactics" and describes "Border Patrol's aggressive tactics"—repeated negative evaluative descriptors applied to enforcement; (3) The author frames that the president "addressed concerns that his deportation agenda was arresting landscapers, farmers and other laborers, not just the criminals," humanizing noncriminals and implying overreach; (4) The piece highlights internal ICE data with the value-laden modifier "only" (e.g., "only 6%" and "11%"), emphasizing a narrative that enforcement is not focused on the most serious offenders, without presenting countervailing metrics; (5) The author provides no independent balancing context supportive of the enforcement rationale beyond attributed quotes, resulting in a structurally one-sided presentation.
